message:
feat(ui): add new CSS utilities and refine site header

Enhance global styles and improve site header responsiveness.

app/globals.css:
- Add new utility classes for article styling
- Expand responsive typography utilities
- Add glass-morphism effects for modern UI elements
- Include new animation keyframes for subtle interactions
- Add dark mode refinements for better contrast

components/raptorq-visualizations.tsx:
- Minor formatting adjustment

components/site-header.tsx:
- Improve mobile navigation responsiveness
- Refine header spacing and alignment
- Adjust breakpoint behaviors for better tablet support

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

           <button onClick={animate} className="rq-btn-action">
